collections.name: users
collections.description: Stores user profiles, license statuses, and device bindings.

securityRules.read: request.auth != null && (request.auth.uid == uid || resource.data.email == request.auth.token.email || request.auth.token.email == 'mondal.saikat185@gmail.com')
securityRules.update: request.auth != null && (request.auth.token.email == 'mondal.saikat185@gmail.com' || (request.auth.uid == uid && request.resource.data.diff(resource.data).affectedKeys().hasOnly(['activeDeviceId', 'deviceLabel', 'boundAt']) && resource.data.status == 'active' && (resource.data.activeDeviceId == null || resource.data.activeDeviceId == '') && request.resource.data.activeDeviceId is string && request.resource.data.activeDeviceId.size() > 0))
